# Before vs After: Voice Personalisation
# ════════════════════════════════════════
# This folder contains two real posts generated from the same news story
# ("Man pleads guilty to $8M AI-generated music scheme") to demonstrate
# the measurable difference personalisation makes.
#
# Both posts were generated by the same agent, same model (claude-sonnet-4-5),
# same article and PM analysis — the ONLY difference is the prompt:
#
#   BEFORE: Generic prompt — "write for Product Managers, professional tone"
#   AFTER:  Personalised prompt — MY_STYLE.md rules + 3 real post examples injected
#
# Judge for yourself which one you'd actually stop scrolling for.
